training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.target_side: STRING keep20 target neighborhood structural features aligned to official gene_id order
pipeline_program.fusion: context-gated low-rank residual over graph-smoothed target features
pipeline_program.prior: official_string_gnn_keep20_graph; missing graph neighborhoods represented by self/zero graph residual only
pipeline_program.head: parent dense logits plus STRING neighborhood attention residual
pipeline_program.training_strategy: weighted cross entropy from parent config
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: STRING neighborhood attention target-side graph prior with real source-backed edges
